nodes.label: Hezron
nodes.description: The older of the two sons of Pharez (Gen. 46:12).

nodes.label: Caleb
nodes.description: One of the three sons of Hezron of the tribe of Judah. He is also called Chelubai (1 Chr. 2:9). His descendants are enumerated (18-20, 42-49).

nodes.label: Jerahmeel
nodes.description: The son of Hezron, the brother of Caleb (1 Chr. 2:9, 25, 26, etc.).

nodes.label: Ram
nodes.description: The son of Hezron, and one of the ancestors of the royal line (Ruth 4:19). The margin of 1 Chr. 2:9, also Matt. 1:3, 4 and Luke 3:33, have “Aram.”

verses.text: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.
And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
